name: ClinicalTrials.gov integration — SGLT2i in heart failure
query: What are the effects of SGLT2 inhibitors on heart failure outcomes?

rankingRules.rule: Results should include clinical trial registrations
Clinical trials should have proper NCT ID and metadata
High evidence (I-II) should outnumber low evidence (IV-V) in top 10

titleFragments: investigation of biomarker response to sglt2 inhibition
